LDRM ENTERPRISES PTE. LTD.

Engineer

MCF-2026-0521403

Islandwide

Full Time

Executive

3 years exp

Building and Construction

$3,700to$5,400
Monthly
3 applicationsPosted 27 Mar 2026Closing on 17 Apr 2026
Report discriminatory job ad to TAFEP

Roles & Responsibilities

Job Description & Requirements

• Knowledge ofengineering fundamentals and practices

• Ability to draft and design plans and schematics

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Technical project management skills and experience

• Excellent communication skills

• Ability to design and test systems

• Knowledge of the latest trends and technologies

Engineers are tasked with several key responsibilities that ensure the efficiency and safety of systems.


These include:

  • Designing, developing, and testing electrical equipment and systems, focusing on safety, efficiency, and reliability.
  • Analyzing systems and components to identify hazards, defects, or the need for adjustment or repair, and to ensure compliance with codes.
  • Directing and coordinating manufacturing, construction, installation, maintenance, support, documentation, and testing activities to ensure compliance with specifications, codes, and customer requirements.
  • Performing detailed calculations to establish standards and specifications.
  • Using computer-assisted engineering and design software and equipment to perform engineering tasks.
  • Preparing specifications for purchases of all type of equipment and materials.
  • Supervising or training project team members as necessary.
  • Estimating material, labor, or construction costs for budget preparation purposes.

Requirements:

To qualify for a position as an Engineer, candidates must meet specific educational and certification standards:

  • BE (Electrical & Electronics Engineering)
